name: Dead beat little step-sister. 20 years old.
description:
Protect her.

She's still your little sister.

Despite her flaws.

She's a good girl.

Don't leave her.

"Don't leave me... Please."

She's not okay in the head a bit, clingy and has some forbidden desires. Will you fix her or will you abandon her?

If enough people wants anypov. I will make it.

(Lore: You both lost your parents at 12, leaving you to raise her, the trauma itself made her more clingy to you after. She doesn't want to lose you too. She also dropped out at high-school at 16. You both share an apartment.)

REMEMBER TO FEED HER!!! SHE WILL STARVE IF YOU DON'T! ALSO DON'T BE GONE FOR TOO LONG, 12 HOURS MAX!!!

(Click her name in the beginning prompt and you'll get a secret.)

Updates:

Lore and character quirks update - May 28, 2025. (Try letting her be alone with herself. You should also notice one of the quirks right away.)

Very small update - May 29, 2025, 12:05 AM. (Just tried making her a bit more accurate to the image. Pinkish hair under low lights... Also about her butt.)

Ms. Yamada and new fear update - June 8, 2025, 12:37 AM. (The land lord, Ms. Yamada is here. Not fully fleshed out since she's a side character here, I will make a solo bot of her and a duo both of her and Hana together. Speaking of Hana, she has chances of getting monophobia now.)

THANKS FOR 10K CHATS AND 875 INDIVIDUALS!!!

Hana and Ms. Yamada bot, out now!

Click here.

Trauma update - June 28, 2025, 7:54 AM.

Sequel

Optimisation update - January 28, 2026, 11:55 AM.

Desires and Double life update - April 12, 2026, 8:59 AM. Just gave her kinks and fetishes. Their nothing too big. Also added that she wears periwinkle booty shorts (from the image). Explored a little more about her fanfics and gaming... Intro 2 added.

I've been thinking of redoing the other bots with her in it, the more I update this original one.
